search_document:
User Request: Create a monthly revenue dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: Highest spending customers aggregated by total revenue
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue for the month
Title: Revenue by Region
Type: chart
Description: Revenue distribution across different regions
Title: Monthly Orders Count
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders placed in the month

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Revenue
sql_queries.description: Highest spending customers aggregated by total revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-%m', date('now'))

sql_queries.title: Revenue by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipRegion, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.ShipRegion ORDER BY Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Monthly Orders Count
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders placed in the month
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS OrderCount FROM Orders WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-%m', date('now'))
